description: Browse and play audiobooks from Audiobookshelf with bidirectional progress sync. Enriches locally-scanned Jellyfin audiobooks with metadata, cover images, and chapter markers from your ABS server.
name: Audiobookshelf
overview: Integrates Jellyfin with a self-hosted Audiobookshelf server. Provides metadata enrichment, cover images, chapter sync, and bidirectional listening progress sync for all mapped users.

versions.changelog: Fix TypeLoadException: rewrite LibraryEnrichmentService to resolve IProviderManager and IFileSystem lazily via IServiceProvider (method-body scope) instead of typed fields, keeping class-level type signature minimal for CLR assembly scan.

Fix TypeLoadException on plugin load: remove IMediaSegmentProvider implementation (MediaSegmentDto.Type transitively references Jellyfin.Database.Implementations.Enums unavailable in plugin load context); revert ProgressSyncService to UserDataSaved-only debounce (remove ISessionManager dependency).

Fix NotSupported on load: replace AddHostedService with plain singleton for LibraryEnrichmentService; remove explicit AbsLinkCleanupTask DI registration (auto-discovered); drop direct Jellyfin.Database.Implementations.Enums reference from AbsChapterSegmentProvider.
Fix TypeLoadException (NotSupported) on Jellyfin 10.11.8 servers: recompile against 10.11.8 API.

Add scheduled cleanup task (Repair Broken Links) that detects stale ABS provider IDs, re-matches against live ABS library, and writes a per-run report to the log directory; filter missing ABS items from all match candidates.

Auto-enrich new books on library scan (IHostedService + ItemAdded); expose ABS chapters as Jellyfin media segments (IMediaSegmentProvider); push progress to ABS immediately on playback stop or pause; fix AbsImageProvider order to prevent ffmpeg timeout on large MP3s; add ABS to Edit Metadata External IDs; fix 404 logged as warning for unplayed books.

Fix metadata matching for books where ABS appends series/subtitle info to titles (containment check + annotation stripping); add IHasOrder(-1) so provider runs before Jellyfin defaults; set ResultLanguage; populate Overview in search results; simplify config page feedback to Dashboard.alert only.

Fix script placed outside data-role=page (Jellyfin SPA never executed it so buttons never wired); fix API response camelCase property reads (Success/Matches/SavedCount were undefined); fix saveUserMappings token refresh (wrong property); guard document-level listeners against stacking on SPA re-navigation.

Fix button handlers and config reload: attach click listeners immediately at script execution (not inside pageshow on document which Jellyfin SPA does not reliably fire); hook pageshow on the page element itself so fields repopulate on return visits.

Fix token persistence: TokenVault was injected with a detached PluginConfiguration instance (not registered in DI) so tokens were never saved. Now reads Plugin.Instance.Configuration directly. Replace all Dashboard.alert() with dual notify() (absModal + Dashboard.alert) to diagnose which feedback method works. Save config now uses ApiClient.updatePluginConfiguration + getPluginConfiguration overlay (preserves unrendered fields) + Dashboard.showLoadingMsg/processPluginConfigurationUpdateResult.

Bug fixes: SaveMappings now correctly persists ABS tokens (token was stripped from DTO); TokenVault calls SaveConfiguration() so tokens survive restart; debounce TryRemove race fixed to prevent duplicate progress updates; Discover Users now uses form URL instead of stale saved config URL; manual user-dropdown assignment preserves ABS token; URL/token fields trimmed consistently.

Align with jellyfin-plugin-template: add .editorconfig, jellyfin.ruleset, Directory.Build.props, GitHub workflows (build/test/publish/codeql), renovate.json. Add explicit Guid override in Plugin.cs. Disable strict CA rules for existing codebase.

Fix configPage.html: add missing pageId variable (ReferenceError crash); remove orphaned return/brace/initPage merge artifacts; guard event listeners against stacking on return visits; fix CSS class names (abs-match-card/abs-spinner) to match JS (user-match-card/loading-spinner). Bump to v1.0.9.0.

Fix settings persistence: use pageshow event instead of unreliable viewshow; fix popup alerts for Test Connection, User Discovery, and Save Mappings; fix XSS vulnerability in user matching UI; fix race condition in renderUserMatches; align with Audiobookshelf API (episode support, complete progress payloads, session sync).

Fix modals: move style block and modal div inside data-role=page (Jellyfin SPA discards head/body); toggle display via inline style not CSS class so modal shows reliably; clean full config page rewrite; fix config save and page reload on return visit.

Full config page rewrite: fix modal outside page div (never rendered by Jellyfin SPA); fix direct-execution init instead of unreliable viewshow event; fix duplicate match cards in Discover Users; fix saveConfig to not depend on getPluginConfiguration; camelCase body keys for Jellyfin JSON deserializer; error modals on all API calls.

Fix config save: use camelCase keys matching Jellyfin JSON serializer so URL and token actually persist. Add result modal for Test Connection, Discover Users, and Save Mappings. Fix empty-selection guard in Save Mappings.
Fix config page token persistence (UserTokenEntries vs XmlIgnore UserTokenMap); fix ChapterSyncTask crash when URL/token not yet configured; safe plugin ID and token helpers throughout.
Fix assembly version mismatch: compile against Jellyfin.Controller 10.11.3 (matching server) instead of 10.11.8; forward-compatible with any 10.11.x server via .NET roll-forward.

Jellyfin 10.11.x compatibility: replace IChapterManager (Video-only) with IChapterRepository; fix Jellyfin.Data.Entities removal; fix TaskTriggerInfoType enum; add [Authorize] to controller; config page viewshow/GUID/accessToken fixes.

Bug fixes: config page checkboxes now interactive; Authorization header added to all API calls; camelCase JSON property names corrected; browser no longer treats server URL + token as a login form; XML serialization crash fixed (Dictionary replaced with serializable List).
Initial alpha release. Metadata provider, bidirectional progress sync, chapter sync, and user mapping.
